title: Executive Order 6067—Authorizing the Appointment of Thomas H. Allen
text:
Thomas H. Allen may be appointed special investigator in the Immigration Service of the Department of Labor without regard to the requirements of the civil- service rules. This employee has rendered highly meritorious service under most trying and difficult circumstances, and I feel the issuance of this order is warranted.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
March 3, 1933.
